examples: But to many, her excuses will sound rather lawyerly.
Not many lawyerly performances have much in common with Tracy as Darrow, especially lately.
Mr. LarsonвАЩs script, for instance, now includes this lawyerly line: вАЬWe canвАЩt confirm exactly where humankindвАЩs next steps in space are going to take us.вАЭ
And no amount of eloquence or lawyerly skill from the managers can change that fact.
This one got way too lawyerly for me, but the initial question was really fascinating.
